info.title: ScrapeBadger TikTok API
info.description: TikTok scraping API for user profiles, videos, comments, transcripts, hashtags, music/sounds, search, trending, and the EU Commercial Content (ad transparency) library. Returns clean structured JSON; handles signing, anti-bot bypass, and regional proxy routing automatically.

get.description: Full TikTok user profile by @handle (stats, verification, links, avatars).

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The user's @handle (unique_id), without the leading '@'.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Content region (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Routes the request through a proxy and signer for that locale.

get.description: A user's posted videos, newest first, with cursor pagination.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The user's @handle (unique_id), without the leading '@'.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Content region (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Routes the request through a proxy and signer for that locale.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-50).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor — pass the `pagination.cursor` value from a prior response to fetch the next page. Omit for the first page.

get.description: **Deprecated (HTTP 410 Gone).** TikTok followers/following/liked-video lists require an authenticated account session, which the ScrapeBadger TikTok API does not provide. This route is retained for contract discoverability but always returns 410. All other TikTok endpoints remain fully supported.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The user's @handle (unique_id), without the leading '@'.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Content region (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Routes the request through a proxy and signer for that locale.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-50).

example.message: This endpoint is deprecated and no longer available. TikTok followers, following, and liked-video lists require an authenticated account session, which the ScrapeBadger TikTok API does not provide.

get.description: Full metadata for a single TikTok video or photo slideshow.

parameters.name: video_id
parameters.description: The numeric TikTok video/aweme id.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Content region (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Routes the request through a proxy and signer for that locale.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: Author @handle. When supplied, skips the oEmbed author lookup for a faster, cheaper fetch.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-50).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor — pass the `pagination.cursor` value from a prior response to fetch the next page. Omit for the first page.

example.voice_to_text: hey guys welcome back to my channel

get.description: Replies to a specific comment on a video.

parameters.name: comment_id
parameters.description: The comment id (cid) whose replies you want.

parameters.name: video_id
parameters.description: The parent video/aweme id the comment belongs to.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Content region (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Routes the request through a proxy and signer for that locale.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-50).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor — pass the `pagination.cursor` value from a prior response to fetch the next page. Omit for the first page.

get.description: Cheap, unauthenticated oEmbed metadata for a TikTok video or profile URL.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Full TikTok video or profile URL.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Content region (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Routes the request through a proxy and signer for that locale.

get.description: General TikTok search — video results from the Top feed.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search keyword.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Content region (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Routes the request through a proxy and signer for that locale.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-50).

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor — pass the `pagination.cursor` value from a prior response to fetch the next page. Omit for the first page. It is an opaque composite token.

get.description: Trending videos from the TikTok Explore feed.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Content region (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Routes the request through a proxy and signer for that locale.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-50).

get.description: Trending hashtags ranked by usage (served via the on-device signer path — view counts and distinct-creator counts).

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Content region (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Routes the request through a proxy and signer for that locale.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Look-back window in days for the trend ranking (e.g. 7, 30, 120).

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-50).

get.description: Trending songs/sounds ranked by usage (served via the on-device signer path — hot-music feed).

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Content region (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Routes the request through a proxy and signer for that locale.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Look-back window in days for the trend ranking (e.g. 7, 30, 120).

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-50).

get.description: Search TikTok's Commercial Content Library (EU Digital Services Act ad transparency) by keyword or advertiser id. EU regions only.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Keyword to search ads by. Ignored when advertiser_id is set.

parameters.name: advertiser_id
parameters.description: Advertiser business id(s) to scope the search to a specific advertiser.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: EU region code — the Ad Library is EU-only (e.g. DE, FR, IE, NL).

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Look-back window in days for ads shown.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order, '<field>,<direction>' (e.g. last_shown_date,desc).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Result offset for pagination.

parameters.name: search_id
parameters.description: Opaque search id from a prior page's `pagination.search_id`, to chain pages.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return (1-50).

get.description: List supported TikTok content regions.

sec_uid.description: Secure user id (sec_uid) used for downstream list calls.

room_id.description: Non-empty while the user is live.

TikTokAuthor.description: Author summary embedded in a video, comment, or search result.

TikTokUserStats.description: Aggregate counts for a user profile.

sec_uid.description: Secure user id — needed to call list endpoints.

video_count.description: Videos using this sound (standalone music endpoints only).

user_count.description: Distinct creators using this sound (standalone music endpoints only).

TikTokMusic.description: Sound/music attached to a video, or a standalone music entity.

TikTokChallenge.description: A hashtag/challenge referenced from a video.

TikTokEffectSticker.description: An effect/sticker applied to a video.

TikTokTextExtra.description: An entity (hashtag or @mention) inside the caption.

TikTokSubtitle.description: A subtitle/caption track for a video.

TikTokAnchor.description: A link/shopping/POI anchor attached to a post.

subtitles.description: Populated only on the transcript endpoint.

TikTokVideo.description: A TikTok post (video or photo slideshow) with full metadata.

TikTokComment.description: A comment or reply on a video.

rank_diff.description: Change in rank vs prior period.

TikTokOEmbed.description: oEmbed metadata for a TikTok URL.

has_more.description: True when more pages are available.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor; pass back as ?cursor= for the next page.

count.description: Number of items in this page.

search_id.description: Search endpoints chain rid → search_id across pages.

TikTokCursorPage.description: Cursor pagination metadata shared by all list endpoints.

TikTokAdVideo.description: A creative asset attached to an ad.

TikTokAd.description: An ad from the Commercial Content Library.

search_id.description: Pass to the next page request.

AdLibraryPage.description: Pagination metadata for Ad Library search.

DeprecatedError.description: Error body returned by deprecated (410 Gone) endpoints.
